query:
SELECT o.name, o.ecoCode, o.isPremium,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzles p WHERE p.openingName = 
    CASE o.name
      WHEN 'Sicilian Defense' THEN 'Sicilian'
      WHEN "Queen's Gambit" THEN 'Queens'
      WHEN 'French Defense' THEN 'French'
      WHEN 'Italian Game' THEN 'Italian'
      WHEN 'Scandinavian Defense' THEN 'Scandinavian'
      ELSE o.name
    END
  ) as puzzleCount
FROM openings o
ORDER BY puzzleCount DESC
LIMIT 20;
